construction.panels: Main body panels in white, with contrasting black side stripe panels running vertically down the outer leg from the waistband to the hem.
construction.seams: Standard visible stitching, matching the fabric color for the main body and side stripes. No contrast stitching is apparent.
construction.closures: Black flat drawstring at the front waist, black zippers on the outer ankle hems.
construction.details: Elastic waistband, two side seam pockets (one visible opening on the right side), straight hem with functional outer ankle zippers.

graphics.content: A stylized heart graphic, appearing to be pierced or bleeding, with a thorny vine wrapped around it. Two red roses with green leaves and stems grow from the top of the heart.

branding.primary_logo: The 'Love Hurts' graphic (stylized heart with roses) serves as the primary visual branding for this collection, embodying the brand's aesthetic.

fabric_appearance: Smooth, slightly shiny performance knit fabric, resembling a satin or high-sheen polyester, with visible subtle folds and drapes.
unique_features: Contrasting black side stripes, embroidered 'Love Hurts' graphic, and functional zippers at the outer ankles.
collection_aesthetic: Oakland luxury streetwear, emotional expression, dark romance, and bold graphic statement, combining athletic wear functionality with distinctive visual storytelling.
